# BP-97 negative variant: gzip output is read after Close
lang: go
file: BP-97-variant-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bufio"
	"bytes"
)

func encode() int {
	buf := &bytes.Buffer{}
	writer := bufio.NewWriter(buf)
	writer.Write([]byte("payload"))
	if err := writer.Flush(); err != nil {
		return 0
	}
	return buf.Len()
}
